languages.text: "Как я и говорила — у тебя недостаточно воли, чтобы навредить мне".
"As I said — you are too craven to harm me."
languages.original_text: "Как я и говорила — у тебя недостаточно воли, чтобы навредить мне".

traits.locale_text: "As I said — you are too craven to harm me."
"As I said — you are too craven to harm me."
"As I said — you are too craven to harm me."

languages.text: «Como ya he dicho, es demasiado cobarde para herirme».
languages.original_text: "As I said — you are too craven to harm me."

traits.locale_text: «Como ya he dicho, es demasiado cobarde para herirme».

languages.text: “我早说过，你还没那个胆量伤我。”
languages.original_text: "As I said — you are too craven to harm me."

traits.locale_text: “我早说过，你还没那个胆量伤我。”

languages.text: « C'est bien ce que je disais, vous n'oserez jamais vous en prendre à moi. »
languages.original_text: "As I said — you are too craven to harm me."

traits.locale_text: « C'est bien ce que je disais, vous n'oserez jamais vous en prendre à moi. »

languages.text: "Dediğim gibi... Bana zarar veremeyecek kadar korkaksın."
languages.original_text: "As I said — you are too craven to harm me."

traits.locale_text: "Dediğim gibi... Bana zarar veremeyecek kadar korkaksın."

languages.text: "Wie gesagt ... Ihr seid zu feige, um mir etwas anzutun."
languages.original_text: "As I said — you are too craven to harm me."

traits.locale_text: "Wie gesagt ... Ihr seid zu feige, um mir etwas anzutun."

languages.text: 「私が言ったように、あなたは私を傷つけるほど臆病です」
languages.original_text: "As I said — you are too craven to harm me."

traits.locale_text: 「私が言ったように、あなたは私を傷つけるほど臆病です」
